meaning: 蟾ｴ驥啓諢丞､ｧ蛻ｩ荳懷漉驛ｨ貂ｯ蟶﹅
examples: Both said they were offered candidacies in recent local elections in Bari.
13a convoy passed a village, as viewed from a bunker at Outpost Bari Alai in Kunar.
7a US soldier observes a bombing strike from a US fighter jet during a firefight at Outpost Bari Alai in Kunar on Sept. 15.
What my grandmother Bari Bauwa had to say was much more than a simple admonition.
If he does go home to Bari, he hopes simply to blend in, he said.
